---
title: "Method, sources and limits"
subtitle: "An analysis must be transparent. Here is where the figures come from, how they were processed, and what they cannot say."
---

::: {.callout-note}
This page is being translated; the narrative text is not final.
:::

## The source

*Text to be translated.*

## The processing applied

*Text to be translated.*

## Statistical methods

*Text to be translated.*

## What this data does not say

*Text to be translated.*

## Reproducibility

*Text to be translated.*
